calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ingrid Evans, Esq. 415-441-8669 of Evans Law Firm for Plaintiff Antoinette Zirkle.
Thomas russell, Esq. 213-250-1800 of Lewis Brisbois for Defendant JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND DBA SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND DBA SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT.

Taken under submission.** Plaintiff submits proposed orders.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling and signs an order denying in part and granting in part DEFENDANTS JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. (see scanned order for details)**

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ingrid Evans, Esq. 415-441-8669 of Evans Law Firm for Plaintiff Antoinette Zirkle.
Thomas russell, Esq. 213-250-1800 of Lewis Brisbois for Defendant JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND DBA SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND DBA SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Taken under submission.** Plaintiff submits proposed orders.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling and signs an order OVERRULING DEFENDANT JAMES BARNES, ADAM SPIEGELMAN AND SPIEGELMAN FINANCIAL'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)**

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
